name: Nutty Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together well the cheese, onion, and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Add 1/8 pound of chopped nuts and blend well again.
3. Form into a large ball and refrigerate overnight.
4. Bring to room temperature one hour before serving.
5. Roll in 1/8 pound of chopped nuts.
6. Serve with crackers or corn chips.
